evidence_label: private recipient source-index readiness refresh, not treatment advice
source: NCBI PubMed ESearch and ESummary plus current web source checks
current_query: (thalassemia OR beta-thalassemia) AND (gamma-globin OR HbF OR fetal hemoglobin OR HUDEP2 OR CD34 OR erythroid OR hemolysis) AND (2025:2026[pdat])

records.role: current thalassemia clinical-context record; keeps source-index work separate from clinical advice
records.title: Thalassemia.

records.role: current gamma-globin biology context; supports endpoint-specific capability mapping
records.title: p27Kip1 regulates gamma-globin production.

records.role: HUDEP2-linked endogenous HbF reporter context; supports model and endpoint capability labels
records.title: A cellular reporter system to evaluate endogenous fetal hemoglobin induction and screen for therapeutic compounds.

records.role: CD34+ beta-thalassemia erythropoiesis model context; supports disease-model capability labels
records.title: A synthetic model of human beta-thalassemia erythropoiesis using CD34+ cells from healthy adult donors.

records.role: hemolysis cytotoxicity context; supports red-cell safety capability mapping
records.title: Optimization of the Hemolysis Assay for the Assessment of Cytotoxicity.

records.journal: Hematology Am Soc Hematol Educ Program
records.role: current thalassemia complication context; supports separating assay-source evidence from patient routing
records.title: Thalassemia and hypercoagulability.

records.role: current editing-trial review context; supports classifying therapy/trial owners separately from preclinical recipients
records.title: CRISPR/Cas9 System as a Promising Therapy in Thalassemia and Sickle Cell Disease: A Systematic Review of Clinical Trials.

records.role: current PubMed heme-assay record; optional heme-safety context only
records.title: A Novel Plasma Heme Assay Reveals Disease Severity in Beta-Thalassemia and Sickle Cell Anemia.

web_sources.role: privacy and de-identification process anchor for keeping identifying details outside public output
web_sources.title: HHS Guidance Regarding Methods for De-identification of Protected Health Information

web_sources.role: privacy-rule context for minimum necessary handling and protected information boundaries
web_sources.title: HHS Summary of the HIPAA Privacy Rule

web_sources.role: current HUDEP-2 source context; useful for generic capability mapping, not real recipient selection
web_sources.title: RIKEN BRC Cell Bank RCB4557: HUDEP-2

decision_use: The private source index should map real candidate sources to capability labels outside Git. Public files should expose only aliases, source-bundle references, source-kind labels, source-count labels, and decision labels.
